claim_bullets.bullet_text: Functions returning functions are a key theme. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)
The chapter begins with a metaphor about cleaning implements. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)
Practical recipes focus on functions that return functions. (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.79-79)

source_record_text: Recipes with basic functions, a chapter that covers partial application, a unary, and other practical recipes for functions that return functions.
